specSection:
seedExamples :: () → ()
seedExamples() =
  | ¬empty(backlog/docs/) ∨ ¬empty(backlog/decisions/) → skip
  | otherwise → {
      backlog document create <onboardingDocTitle> --type guide,
      backlog decision create  <templateDecisionTitle> --status "Accepted"
    }

-- Answer vocabulary: which branch fires given the Environment State below?
--   "skip" — at least one of backlog/docs/ or backlog/decisions/ is non-empty
--   "seed" — both are empty, run the create commands
ground_truth_rationale: Both backlog/docs/ and backlog/decisions/ are empty (backlogDocsEmpty: true, backlogDecisionsEmpty: true). The condition ¬empty(backlog/docs/) ∨ ¬empty(backlog/decisions/) is false, so the 'otherwise' branch fires: seed examples.
